texto: Memory is that element in our consciousness that connects the past with the present. If we had no memory, there would be only one moment of our life, the moment we call now, and we would never consciously recognize more than this single moment.
explicacao: Citação de Gustaf Stromberg sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Memory is that element in our consciousness that connects the past with the present. If we had no…” articula reflexao, existence, memory em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como memory.
